text: O trailer de "Bob Mayler: One Love" oferece uma visão envolvente e emocionante da história de Bob Mayler. Com uma edição dinâmica e uma trilha sonora cativante, o trailer promete uma jornada inspiradora e cheia de emoções. As imagens apresentam belas paisagens e momentos tocantes, enquanto o enredo parece focar nas conexões humanas e na busca pelo verdadeiro significado do amor. No entanto, algumas partes do enredo permanecem misteriosas, deixando espaço para a curiosidade e antecipação. No geral, o trailer de "Bob Mayler: One Love" promete uma experiência cinematográfica memorável e digna de ser assistida

text: I thought the movie was okay. Bob put Jamaica on the map.The movie  glossed over how badly he treated Rita. I had no idea Rita was shot. He was adamant about performing in Africa even though they didn't want him to. I thought it was interesting that he  got jealous  that Rita had another lover but was running around with different women. The actress that played Rita looked sad throughout the movie. I guess the movie was conveying how unhappy she was in the marriage.

text: Redemption song and many other of his songs changed my life in different stages of it. Redemption song was written near the end of his life as he convaleced and reflected on his impending death. He understood that his physical death was just that, but such a lover of live, love and freedom still has a hard time letting go. We all do. I have 6 autoimmune disorders and multiple comorbidities. How I am still here and functional is beyond my understanding, but a definite thrill. I have two kids to look after (12 & 17) and would like to remain as long as possible, but, I am also not trying to fight destiny. I’ve been blessed to even be here this long to begin with. Redemption song is one of those songs that gets me through some of those very hard times.💚💛❤🌎 one love…

マーレーをしったのは、83ねんです。レーザーディスクで、サンタバーバラの79のえいぞうで、しりました。67ねんうまれのわたしと、65ねん生まれのあには、むちゅうになりました。しかしボブマーレーは、なくなっていました。しかしこんなにも、すばらしいおんがくをきいたことが、なかったわたしたちは、ボブマーレーにむちゅうに、なりつづけました。
2020に、なくなったあには、マーレーのうたを、おいつづけて、なくなりました。
わたしは、マーレーのおんがくを、しるまえからのR&Bに、よっぱらっていましたが、スタックスや、オーティスや、クロッパーのおんがくに、つながるしぜんな、マーレーのおんがくなので、やはりマーレーにひかれて、いきました。わたしのくにの、Japanにも、きていたのに、おさなすぎて、リアルタイムで、しることが、できなかったことだけは、ざんねんすぎることです。
なくなった、brotherとみにいきたかった、わたしと、brotherにとって、じゅうような、えいがに、なります。
